title: senecio crassulus
intro: Senecio crassulus, also known as Groundsel Bush, is a plant species native to Australia, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which are said to aid in relieving respiratory issues and wounds. Some of the health benefits associated with Senecio crassulus include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
